ddls:
CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., physical, virtual, personnel) */,
  "resource_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the resource */,
  "resource_category" TEXT /* Category of the resource (e.g., IT, HR, Finance) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_rollup_1" INTEGER /* Rollup identifier for the first level of role hierarchy */,
  "role_rollup_2" INTEGER /* Rollup identifier for the second level of role hierarchy */,
  "role_deptname" TEXT /* Department name associated with the role */,
  "role_title" TEXT /* Title of the role */,
  "role_family_desc" TEXT /* Description of the role family */,
  "role_family" INTEGER /* Identifier for the role family */,
  "role_code" INTEGER /* Unique code for the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource on which action is taken */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "mgr_id" INTEGER /* Manager ID responsible for the action */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role performing the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., create, read, update, delete) */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was taken */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_mgr_id FOREIGN KEY ("mgr_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the actions table */,
  "audit_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit log was created */,
  "audit_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the audit log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id")
)
